parameters.content:
## 1. Schedule
Runs daily and summarizes the last 24 hours of UTC operational activity.

## 2. Admin users
Finds admin recipients from user_profiles.is_admin = true.

## 3. Ops counts
Summarizes new users, pending coaches, booking outcomes, pack purchases, and tracked automation failures.

## 4. Duplicate guard
Uses a deterministic admin digest href per date because admin_notifications has no JSON data column.

## 5. Run summary
Returns admin counts, digest counts, created/skipped counts, and errors.

### Implementation note
Writes to admin_notifications only. No migration, no email, and no external analytics system in v1.
